payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update the memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to Sara, likely the same person as the existing Sara, but states a different family relationship that conflicts with the existing durable memory.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new relationship for Sara.

repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Record that there may be two different people named Sara, one daughter and one niece.
Add clarification explaining how Sara is both your daughter and niece, if applicable.
